metadata.description: Sentinel Scheduled Analytics Rule — Failed Azure Resource Manager operations spike. MITRE Discovery (T1087). 10+ failed operations from a single caller within 5 minutes suggests permission probing or misconfigured automation worth investigating.

properties.description: Detects 10+ failed Azure Resource Manager operations from a single caller within 5 minutes.
properties.query:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ActivityStatusValue == "Failure"
| summarize FailureCount = count() by Caller, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where FailureCount >= 10
